deferred.reason: AP-domain policies (no payment released over a control exception without an approver-signed rationale; no vendor banking change accepted without documented out-of-band verification; no vendor payable until TIN verification and sanctions screening complete; block scope limited to the payment at risk) require guardrail-service / OPA policy materialization, which Core does not expose as a pack surface yet. The behavioral core is partially covered today by Core invariants: every pack-configured agent is proposal-mode with four-eyes approval (agent-runtime), and the agent instructions + disposition taxonomy route payment blocks and releases exclusively to human analysts with the AP Controls Manager as approver.

Bespoke LangGraph recipes (Exception Triage Copilot, Banking-Change Verification Sentinel, Duplicate-Pair Matcher, Recovery Statement Auditor) require agent-runtime graph-module registration (BRD 23 BR-12). This pack specializes the existing case-triage + analytics agents via TenantAgentConfig prompt_params + tenant-scope RAG grounding instead.

Production read connectors (ERP AP subledgers: SAP S/4HANA, Oracle Fusion, NetSuite; P2P suites: Coupa, Ariba, Ivalua; invoice-capture/ OCR platforms; bank payment gateways for run schedules; vendor-master and TIN/sanctions screening services) require customer credentials and pack-service connector materialization. The pack ships seed datasets in the exact landing shape; production connectors are configured through the product Data > Connections UI.

Write adapters (place/release payment blocks in the ERP, park or reject invoices back to the vendor portal, post negotiated credit memos, update vendor-master banking details after verification) execute only behind pack-service's materialization contract and customer credentials; every such write stays proposal-mode with human approval — no autonomous payment movement or vendor-master change, ever.

Golden eval sets (duplicate-pair matching, BEC banking-change triage, split-invoicing detection, release-vs-block calibration) require eval-service write APIs whose action names are not yet in the rbac canonical catalog (Core follow-up noted in rbac catalog.go).

Ontology registration (Vendor, VendorBankAccount, PurchaseOrder, GoodsReceipt, Invoice, InvoiceLine, PaymentRun, Exception, CreditMemo, ApprovalThreshold, RecoveryClaim) awaits pack-service; entity semantics are carried today by the ap_audit_core semantic model and dataset schemas.

Typed case schemas (duplicate_review, banking_change_verification, shell_vendor_investigation, price_variance_negotiation, recovery_claim) await case-service schema materialization; today's cases carry the same fields via display_projection + the disposition taxonomy.

Model archetypes (duplicate_pair_confidence, vendor_fraud_risk_score) await experiment-service archetype APIs; the scoring capability ships as pipeline seeds instead (isolation_forest invoice anomaly + xgboost exception-outcome scorer) with model-governance expectations noted in grounding memories.

Display-label overlays ("Exception", "Payment block", "Banking change pending verification", "Discount window closing", entity templates) require the BFF label-registry endpoints (BFF-FR-082/088) which are pack-service-tier features.
